body:
## Problem

/endorsement-news has SSR meta (added by #1407) but NO JSON-LD schema in the handler (confirmed: api/meta/[...path].js line 1899 returns title/description/url only — no articleSchema, no faqSchema).

Open proposal #1665 covers /facts + /gear-news CollectionPage but explicitly omits /endorsement-news. This is the third hub in the same bug class that remains unschemed.

Page is at sitemap priority 0.9 and carries high-intent queries: '[drummer name] endorsement deal', '[brand] sponsors [drummer]'. No schema means zero AI Overview eligibility.

## Fix

File: api/meta/[...path].js

In the /endorsement-news handler (around line 1899), add:

articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@type': 'CollectionPage',
  name: 'Metal Drummer Endorsement News',
  description: 'Latest endorsement deals and brand sponsorships in metal drumming. Track which drum brands are signing which metal drummers.',
  url: BASE_URL + '/endorsement-news',
  publisher: { '@type': 'Organization', name: 'MetalForge', url: BASE_URL },
}),
faqSchema: [
  {
    question: 'Which metal drummers are currently endorsed by Tama?',
    answer: 'MetalForge tracks Tama endorsements across 60+ metal drummers. Visit /endorsement-news or browse individual drummer profiles to see current Tama endorsement deals.',
  },
  {
    question: 'What does it mean for a drummer to be endorsed by a brand?',
    answer: 'A drum endorsement means the brand sponsors the drummer, often providing free or discounted gear in exchange for promotion. Endorsed drummers typically use and publicly advocate for the brand.',
  },
  {
    question: 'Which drum brand has the most metal drummer endorsements?',
    answer: 'Tama and DW Drums lead metal drummer endorsements in the MetalForge database, followed by Pearl, Ludwig, Zildjian, and Meinl for cymbals.',
  },
],

## Pages affected
- /endorsement-news (sitemap priority 0.9, changefreq: weekly)

## Estimated uplift
AI Overview eligibility for endorsement-deal queries. Endorsement news is a high-search-intent category — fans actively search '[brand] endorses [drummer]' for purchasing validation and brand research.

## GSC query bucket served
'metal drummer endorsements', '[brand] sponsored drummer', '[drummer] gear deal' — AI Overview + PAA.

## Verify
1. curl https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/endorsement-news shows CollectionPage + FAQPage in response
2. Google Rich Results Test on https://metalforge.io/endorsement-news shows FAQPage detected
3. Schema.org validator returns no errors for /endorsement-news
4. articleSchema type is CollectionPage (not Article — this is a hub, not editorial)

## Done
CollectionPage articleSchema + faqSchema added to /endorsement-news handler in api/meta/[...path].js.
title: SEO: /endorsement-news page — add CollectionPage + FAQPage JSON-LD schema (sitemap priority 0.9, schema missing)
note: Fix already applied in commit 33d2e6e. CollectionPage + FAQPage schema confirmed present at api/meta/[...path].js lines 2575-2596. Syntax validated with node --check.
